summary: Restructured opening paragraph to eliminate structural duplication with Chapter 12. Both chapters originally opened with the same 'notification [verb] while Dan was [mundane activity]' scaffold; Chapter 11 now leads with Dan's domestic action and introduces the notification as a mid-paragraph interruption, creating distinct entry points between adjacent chapters. All other seams (entry from Ch10, exit to Ch12) are clean. No style bible example_lines found verbatim. Character voice and contraction levels verified correct.
edits: Restructured opening paragraph: moved 'Dan was standing in the kitchen eating crackers over the sink' to lead position and repositioned the notification timestamp ('At 4:47 on a Thursday') as an interrupting beat, eliminating the 'notification arrived while Dan was...' scaffold shared with Chapter 12's opening.
